testcase.name: test_payment_with_tip_and_sale_ids
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter11_phase14.py:118: in test_payment_with_tip_and_sale_ids assert abs(c["balance"] - 5.0) < 0.01 ^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'balance'

testcase.name: test_admin_can_reverse_any_payment
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter11_phase14.py:153: in test_admin_can_reverse_any_payment assert abs(c["balance"]) < 0.01 or c["balance"] >= 0 ^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'balance'

testcase.name: test_creator_after_5min_forbidden

skipped.message: Sem endpoint admin para forçar created_at antigo; janela 5min coberta no caminho positivo

testcase.skipped: /app/backend/tests/test_iter11_phase14.py:197: Sem endpoint admin para forçar created_at antigo; janela 5min coberta no caminho positivo

testcase.name: test_funcionario_food_outside_hours_blocked_or_allowed
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter11_phase14.py:228: in test_funcionario_food_outside_hours_blocked_or_allowed assert r.status_code == 400, f"esperava bloqueio fora 16-20h (hora={hour}), got {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: esperava bloqueio fora 16-20h (hora=15), got 200 {"id":"a9e47da5-c82f-46bc-aa53-d9a21ff51cb4","tx_number":245,"client_id":"e2625876-bc94-47cf-aa65-58296f5c299a","client_name":"TEST_food_func","items":[{"product_id":"522a1275-1c8b-4939-bb20-a542229567ae","product_name":"TEST_food_func_prod","unit_price":2.0,"quantity":1,"subtotal":2.0,"is_house_account":false,"house_value":0.0}],"total":2.0,"house_total":0.0,"points_earned":0,"points_pending_before":0.0,"points_pending_after":0.0,"is_member_at_sale":false,"created_at":"2026-05-14T14:19:54.231945+00:00","user_email":"func1@ard.pt"} E assert 200 == 400 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_funcionario_blocked_admin_allowed
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter11_phase14.py:245: in test_funcionario_blocked_admin_allowed assert r1.status_code == 400, r1.text E AssertionError: {"id":"4e5ec281-044c-4225-95fe-807502c2ed45","tx_number":246,"client_id":"b583ef96-0822-4749-b822-5674c307a3dd","client_name":"TEST_unavail_cli","items":[{"product_id":"a5689ddc-36e1-4d41-927c-34e49ff8f37e","product_name":"TEST_unavail","unit_price":1.5,"quantity":1,"subtotal":1.5,"is_house_account":false,"house_value":0.0}],"total":1.5,"house_total":0.0,"points_earned":0,"points_pending_before":0.0,"points_pending_after":0.0,"is_member_at_sale":false,"created_at":"2026-05-14T14:19:54.601364+00:00","user_email":"func1@ard.pt"} E assert 200 == 400 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_house_sale_creates_expense_and_zero_total
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter11_phase14.py:266: in test_house_sale_creates_expense_and_zero_total assert sale["total"] == 0.0 E assert 6.0 == 0.0
